song.title: We May Not Die But Rise
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) We may not die, But rise and meet the Lord! This blessed hope, God shows us in His Word;|| The Spirit makes it Plain to us His own— He’ll catch us from This world to His own throne.
[V2] 2) We may not die, But rise and meet the Lord! Oh, the bright glory These few words afford!|| Changed instantly, The twinkling of an eye, And see Thee face to face, Our Lord for aye!
[V3] 3) Some shall not die, But rise and meet the Lord, O precious promise! Faithful, true and good!|| Although we do not know The day or hour, We know that He Himself Shall come in pow’r.
[V4] 4) We may not die, Then let us more pure be, Cut off each sin, unseen, Or that men see,|| This world is passing, Heav’n will quickly come, Then let us day by day Be more like Him!
[V5] 5) We shall arise, And meet Him in the air! Then let us not Entangled be down here!|| We look for Christ! We do not look for death! Our hope at any hour, To leave this earth.
[v6] 6) We shall arise, And to our Lord ascend, When His victorious Shout the air shall rend!|| O come! Lord Jesus, Come! His saints now cry, Come quickly! so, we e’er Shall be with Thee.
song.author: William H. Monk
